response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate has minimal demonstrable C++ experience beyond a brief role at National Instruments over a decade ago, and lacks current hands-on work with STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial automation — all core requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern JavaScript/TypeScript and cloud-native tooling
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication through workshops and documentation
Proven ability to work across diverse systems including embedded, IoT, and distributed platforms
concerns: No recent C++ or STL development; core technical requirement not met
Lacks experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) and industrial protocols (OPC UA, Modbus, etc.)
No evidence of designing or deploying high-performance, multi-threaded, or message-broker-based systems in the last 8+ years
